REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' KIMO INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: (1) ALLEGATIONS PERTAINING TO SPANISH TRANSLATION ARE STRICKEN AS IRRELEVANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO EITHER ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING APPLICABILITY OF CCC 1632 OR TO ALLEGE FACTS REFERENCED IN OPPOSITION 3:26-4:1; (2) REFERENCE TO EQUITABLE INDEMNITY IN THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS STRICKEN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A SEPARATE CAUSE OF ACTION AND FACTS SUPPORTING ALTERNATIVE REMEDY OF EQUITABLE INDEMNITY. MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED AT THIS STAGE OF THE LITIGATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT KIMO INC'S DEMURER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A PURPORTED THIRD-PARTY BENEFICIARY IS A PROPER DEFENDANT IN A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RESCISSION OF A CONTRACT TO WHICH THE DEFENDANT IS NOT A PARTY. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. CAUSES OF ACTION FOR RESCISSION OF THE LISTING AGREEMENT (ENTERED INTO BY THE PARTIES PER PARAGRAPH 19 OF THE COMPLAINT) AND ELDER ABUSE (PROPERTY TAKEN AS THERE IS EFFECTIVELY A CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE) ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Wong, 408.330.0300 for Defendant Lucky Briella, LLC. (via Court call)
Mark Wilson, 415.217.6990 for Defendant Kimo, Inc. dba Nai Northern California. (via Court call)
Michael Rooney, 415.533.0282 for Plaintiff Sylvia Gillespie. (via Court call)

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Kimo Inc's Demurer to Complaint is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the second cause of action. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a purported third-party beneficiary is a proper defendant in a cause of action for rescission of a contract to which the defendant is not a party. Demurrer is otherwise OVERRULED. Causes of action for rescission of the listing agreement (entered into by the parties per paragraph 19 of the complaint) and elder abuse (property taken as there is effectively a cloud on Plaintiff's title) are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Wong, 408.330.0300 for Defendant Lucky Briella, LLC. (via Court call)
Mark Wilson, 415.217.6990 for Defendant Kimo, Inc. dba Nai Northern California. (via Court call)
Michael Rooney, 415.533.0282 for Plaintiff Sylvia Gillespie. (via Court call)

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Kimo Inc's Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as follows: (1) allegations pertaining to Spanish translation are stricken as irrelevant with leave to amend for Plaintiff to either allege facts supporting applicability of CCC 1632 or to allege facts referenced in opposition 3:26-4:1; (2) reference to equitable indemnity in the second cause of action is stricken with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege a separate cause of action and facts supporting alternative remedy of equitable indemnity. Motion is otherwise denied. Request for punitive damages and attorney's fees is sufficiently alleged at this stage of the litigation. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
